message:
perf(indexer,storage): replace COUNT(*) rebuild fingerprint with fs stat, add lightweight conversation projection, and preflight repair for read-only opens

Replace the expensive SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages query used to
detect rebuild-state changes with a cheap filesystem stat fingerprint
(db_size:db_mtime:wal_size:wal_mtime). This eliminates a full table
scan that grew linearly with database size and blocked the rebuild
checkpoint comparison.

indexer/mod.rs:
- Bump LEXICAL_REBUILD_STATE_VERSION from 1 to 2, forcing all
  existing checkpoints to restart from scratch
- Replace LexicalRebuildDbState.total_messages with
  storage_fingerprint (String)
- Delete count_total_messages() (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages)
- Add metadata_stamp(path) for reading file size + mtime
- Add lexical_rebuild_storage_fingerprint(db_path) that computes
  "{db_len}:{db_mtime_ms}:{wal_len}:{wal_mtime_ms}" fingerprint
- Skip cloning conversation metadata_json during rebuild since
  ensure_cass_origin populates the needed fields independently
- Update test fixtures to use storage_fingerprint format

lib.rs:
- Update test fixture JSON to version 2 with storage_fingerprint

storage/sqlite.rs:
- Add LexicalRebuildConversationRow: lightweight 10-field struct
  that intentionally omits metadata_json, metadata_bin, and
  approx_tokens to avoid forcing frankensqlite to traverse large
  overflow chains before the first lexical checkpoint commits
- Change fetch_conversations_for_lexical_rebuild() to return
  Vec<LexicalRebuildConversationRow> with slimmed-down SQL
- open_readonly() now does a preflight read-write open+close cycle
  to ensure schema repairs (missing tables/indexes) run before the
  actual read-only connection is established
- Remove explicit INDEXED BY idx_messages_conv_idx hints from
  fetch_messages_for_lexical_rebuild, lightweight variant, and
  batched fetch — let SQLite choose the access path automatically
- Rewrite test to use opcode-level EXPLAIN (SeekGE present, no
  SorterOpen) instead of checking index name strings from EXPLAIN
  QUERY PLAN
- New test: open repairs missing named indexes when version markers
  lie (drops idx_messages_created and idx_conversations_source_path)
- New test: open_readonly repairs missing indexes via preflight
  read-write cycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
